title: OverlayTriggersInput
description: INPUT contract of the `overlay_triggers` scripted step. It computes boolean OVERLAY triggers a downstream criterion's `if:` skip-guard reads, so conditional criterion inclusion needs no expression-grammar extension. KEYWORD triggers: `keyword_triggers` maps a trigger name to a list of keywords, each matched case-insensitively as a substring against `text`. STRUCTURAL triggers (from the ticket graph) are emitted when `structural` is true or `linked_types` is non-empty AND a ticket is in scope: `has_children`, and `has_linked_<type>` per `linked_types` entry. All fields optional.

text.description: Text scanned for KEYWORD triggers (case-insensitive substring match).

keyword_triggers.description: Map of trigger name -> list of keywords; each becomes a boolean output (true iff any keyword is a substring of `text`).

ticket_id.description: Ticket for STRUCTURAL triggers. Optional — falls back to the workflow's target ticket.

linked_types.description: Ticket types to test among the ticket's links; emits `has_linked_<type>: bool` for each.

structural.description: Force structural triggers (e.g. `has_children`) even when `linked_types` is empty (a ticket must be in scope).
